particulars.description: As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower. With full title guarantee charges to the lender, by way of a first legal mortgage, all estates or interests in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now owned by it, including the real property specified in schedule 1, being:. 1. swanton house, elwick road, ashford, kent,TN23 1NN, registered at the land registry under title numbers K78939 and K127882;. 2. conyers, church road, ashford, kent, TN23 1RE registered at the land registry under title number K192959;. 3. the land lying to the east of church road, ashford, kent, that connects swanton house and conyers and is registered at the land registry under title number K454894;. 4. former b&q site, beaver road, ashford, kent TN23 7RR registered at the land registry under title number K560928; and. 5. the land on the south-west side of romney marsh road, ashford, kent at the land registry under title number K921404.. As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower. With full title guarantee charges to the lender by way of a first fixed charge:. 1. all present and future estates or interests of the borrower in, or over, any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property (other than any such property effectively mortgaged under clause 3.1); and. 2. all of the intellectual property as defined in the charge document.. Please refer to the charge document for details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the authority, by way of a first legal mortgage, the property described in schedule 1, being:. 1) swanton house, elwick road, ashford, kent ,TN23 1NN, registered at the land registry under title numbers K78939 and K127882; and. 2) the land lying to the east of church road, ashford, kent, that connects swanton house and conyers and is registered at the land registry under title number K454894.. Please refer to the charge document for details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the authority, by way of a first legal mortgage, the property described in schedule 1, being conyers, church road, ashford, kent, TN23 1RE registered at the land registry under title number K192959.. Please refer to the charge document for details.

As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the chargor with full title guarantee charges to the authority, by way of a first legal mortgage, the property described in schedule 1, being the land registered at the land registry as:. 1) b & q PLC, beaver road, ashford, TN23 7RR under title number K560928; and. 2) land on the south west side of romney marsh road, ashford under title number K921404.. Please refer to the charge document for details.

(1) swanton house, elwick road, ashford TN23 1NN as registered at the land registry under title numbers K78939 and K127882; and. (2) conyers, church road, ashford TN23 1RE as registered at the land registry under title number K192959; and. (3) the land lying to the east of church road, ashford that connects the swanton house and conyers and is registered at the land registry under title number K454894.
Former b&q site, beaver road, ashford, kent TN23 7RR and land on the south west side of romney marsh road, ashford with title numbers K560928 and K921404.
